completed_tasks.name: Reproduce the first EMEL/reference divergence on current CPU-only binaries
Fix the first proven numerical or sampling divergence without hidden control flow
completed_tasks.progress: Added and passed a bit-exact arm64 GGML NEON softmax regression; full-card GGML-compatible sampling and actor-owned RNG remain unfinished.

remaining_tasks.name: Run matched-seed moshi.cpp and EMEL PersonaPlex E2E from the same macOS say WAV
Compare token traces and generated WAVs, then confirm and play intelligible speech
Run scoped tests, domain checks, README sync, and quality gates

blockers.description: EMEL still diverges from moshi.cpp at generated frame 0 audio codebook 2 because the sampler does not yet materialize the same full-card f32 softmax probability buffer before top-k exponential sampling.
blockers.workaround: Continue from the passing arm64 softmax regression and port the reference sampling arithmetic before rerunning the slow CPU E2E.

decisions.decision: Keep all reference and EMEL runs CPU-only.
decisions.rationale: The user explicitly rejected Metal and requires CPU parity.

decisions.decision: Treat frame 0 codebook 2 as the earliest authoritative failure boundary.
decisions.rationale: With seed 1234 and aligned draw counts, both implementations emit 1049,488 before EMEL chooses 572 and moshi.cpp chooses 1632.

decisions.decision: Port GGML's arm64 NEON v_expf arithmetic before changing model execution.
decisions.rationale: The prior EMEL softmax used scalar expf on arm64 and differed from actual GGML output by 1-2 ULPs; the new regression now matches all 16 reference lanes bit-for-bit.

next_action: Replace Moshi sampling's raw-logit shortcut with the reference sequence: f32 inverse-temperature scaling, full-card soft_max_row_ggml, top-k on materialized probabilities, reference exponential draws, and f32 probability/divisor argmax; add a failing sampler regression first and keep behavior choices in guards/transitions.
context_notes: The goal is incomplete. No EMEL output WAV has completed. A fresh CPU run reproduced the same codebook-2 mismatch and stopped during voice prefill at frame 10. The arm64 softmax regression passes, but the full sampling path, injected/model-owned inference configuration, actor-owned RNG, matched E2E run, audible verification, and final gates remain.
